title: Gone Without a Trace: The Disappearance of Brandon Lawson

scenes.text: A call for help that led to a vast search.
It happened in Texas, along a desolate highway.
In 2013, Brandon vanished after calling 911 with a desperate plea.
Despite extensive searches, he was never found.
scenes.label: STILL UNRESOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Texas, USA - 2013. Brandon Lawson called 911 for help but mysteriously disappeared afterward. As of today, he remains missing. Follow for daily cold cases!
